title: endotropis crocea
intro: Endotropis crocea is a species of butterfly pea, a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Fabaceae family. It is native to tropical regions of Asia and is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Endotropis crocea include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and exhibit antimicrobial activity. In herbal preparations, the leaves and flowers of the plant are often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
